(403/CWW) PET IN PRO PER; RESP IN PRO PER; EDNA HENLEY FOR MINOR; FCS MEDIATOR BJ HERAN. THE COURT HAS RECEIVED A FAX FROM BONNIE MCNABB THAT PURPORTS TO BE A DECLARAT
ION BUT THE COURT CANNOT CONSIDER IT AS AN EX PARTE COMMUNICATION. THE COURT HAS ALSO RECEIVED PET'S RESP FILED YESTERDAY; A COPY OF A TELEPHONE
ATTEND FAMILY COUNSELING AND IT IS SO ORDERED. THERAPY SHALL COMMENCE BY 7/1/99. MS. HENLEY SHALL PROVIDE THE PARTIES WITH A LIST OF POSSIBLE
DERS (E.G., HOLIDAYS AND VACATION CV) REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED. PARTIES ORDERED TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT CALLING UNLESS A STIPULATION IS REACHED AND
THE MATTER IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. MS. HENLEY SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER. CONT. TO 12/2/99 AT 9:00A FOR REVIEW CV. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE #5797
